title: Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Tales1-20}} {{Device |image=[[File:Jarjarcup.jpg]] |name=Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup |manufacturer= |model= |type=[[Diet/Legends|Drinking]] cup{{Tales|20|Melvin Fett (comic story)}} |culture= |creators= |created=By [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]][[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] is referred to as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[Melvin Fett (comic story)|Melvin Fett]]." "[[The Written Word]]" states that Binks became a senator following [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] [[Death/Legends|death]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Therefore, the events of "Melvin Fett" must take place after Amidala's death. |modifier= |destroyed= |discovered= |owners= |locations=[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] |cost= |value= |structure= |size=[[Limb/Legends|Handheld]] |material= |length= |width= |height= |weight= |protection= |capacity= |range= |inscription="[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|JAR JAR]]" |markings= |purpose=*Storing [[Soda/Legends|beverages]] for consumption *Commemoration of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Jar Jar Binks |heritage= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|MESA THIRSTY! MEEESA THIRSTY!|The "talking action" of the Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup|}} A '''Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup''' was a type of [[Diet/Legends|drinking]] container made in the likeness of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]]. While attempting to [[Hunting/Legends|collect]] a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the senator on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Melvin Fett]] encountered a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] sipping [[Soda/Legends|soda]] from one such cup. Confusing the souvenir with the Gungan, Fett seized the item, content that he had captured his target. ==Description== {{Quote|HOW WUDE!|One of the cup's phrases|}} A [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] commemorative [[Diet/Legends|drinking]] cup was a small [[Limb/Legends|handheld]] container designed to hold [[Foodstuff/Legends|beverages]], such as [[Soda/Legends|soda]]. Its contents could be sipped out of a flexible straw. The [[Color/Legends|white]] cup was inscribed with the name "JAR JAR" and topped with an orange lid sculpted in the fashion of the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] senator Jar Jar Binks. The sculpt depicted the Gungan's head and arms, with the straw rising out from the back of the neck. The cup featured "talking action" and was able to dictate phrases in the recognizable voice of Binks. ==History== {{Quote|MESA THIRSTY.''"
"''…Actually, ''I'm'' thirsty, too, Jar Jar!|The cup and Melvin Fett|}} [[File:Melvincapturesbinks.jpg|thumb|left|230px|Melvin Fett captures the Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup.]] At some point after the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Melvin Fett]], cousin of famed [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], hoping to collect a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the Gungan senator Jar Jar Binks and thereby prove his worth to other bounty hunters. However, he grew [[Water/Legends|dehydrated]] during his search and would have wandered the planet's [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] endlessly had he not come across a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] slurping a [[Temperature/Legends|cold]], blue soda from a Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup. Mistaking the beverage container for the actual senator, Fett pulled his [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster]] and prepared to shoot the cup but instead tripped on a rock, flinging the weapon into the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]]. The [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] slammed into the Jawa's head, sending the souvenir cup flying from the [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid's]] hands and into Fett's. Content that he had completed his mission, Fett stated to the cup that no bounty hunter would laugh at him again and confided that he, too, was thirsty. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Thanks guys! It was a pleasure to draw the Jar Jar Binks sippy cup (which I actually own).|James Kochalka, replying to fans on Twitter|}} [[File:Kochalka_Jar_Jar_cup.jpg|thumb|right|250px|James Kochalka's real-world Jar Jar Binks cup]] A Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup appeared in "[[Melvin Fett (comic story)|Melvin Fett]]," a story contained in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]]. The story was written and illustrated by [[James Kochalka]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[June 30]], [[2004]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53998/star_wars_tales_1999_20|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #20}} The Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cup is based on a real-world product owned by Kochalka{{Twitter|the_kochalka|status/682050155344998400|[[James Kochalka]]|quote=Thanks guys! It was a pleasure to draw the Jar Jar Binks sippy cup (which I actually own).|archiveurl=https://archive.is/5f99f}} that was sold by the fast-food chain [[Wikipedia:Pizza Hut|Pizza Hut]] to promote the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].{{WebCite|url=https://skywalkingthroughneverland.com/star-wars-fast-food-premiums-1999-the-phantom-menace|text=Celebrating 20 Years of The Phantom Menace Fast Food Premiums|author=Woloski, Sarah|date=2019-03-12|work=[https://skywalkingthroughneverland.com Skywalking Through Neverland]|archiveurl=https://archive.is/g5lJz}} Kochalka considers the cup to be a beloved item{{Twitter|the_kochalka|status/682210799193042944|[[James Kochalka]]|quote=My beloved Jar Jar Binks cup, and Eisner Award for comparison #starwars|archiveurl=https://archive.is/w83QI}} and incorporated it into several strips of [[Wikipedia:James Kochalka#American Elf|''American Elf'']],{{Twitter|the_kochalka|status/656790645558874112|[[James Kochalka]]|quote=I drew Jar Jar a couple times in American Elf… Or at least I drew my Jar Jar shaped plastic cup.|archiveurl=https://archive.is/jKHYq}} a long-running series of short autobiographical comics.{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/560248/american-elf-book-4-the-collected-sketchbook-diaries-of-james-kochalka-january--1-2008---december-31-2011-by-james-kochalka|text=American Elf Book 4: The Collected Sketchbook Diaries of James Kochalka: January 1 2008 – December 31 2011}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Senator Jar Jar Binks commemorative drinking cups}} *{{Tales|20|Melvin Fett (comic story)}} {{1st}} {{Nc}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Taza conmemorativa de Jar Jar Binks }} [[Category:Containers]] [[Category:Toys and merchandise]]
